headings.strategy: Serif font for high-end luxury feel. tracking-tight for large headings.

body.strategy: Clean geometric sans for readability and modern edge.

colors.strategy: Deep midnight/slate base representing cool shade against the desert sun. Champagne gold accents for premium luxury.

layout.spacing: Generous spacing (py-24, gap-12) for high-end feel.
layout.grid: Bento Grid Mode A for marketing sections. Mode B for Admin dashboard.

surfaces.glassmorphism: bg-[#0B0F15]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 - Use for sticky header and overlaid cards.
surfaces.cards: bg-[#131A22] border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform

components.buttons: rounded-none or small radius (rounded-sm). bg-primary text-black font-medium tracking-wide uppercase text-sm px-8 py-4 transition-colors hover:bg-primaryHover
components.forms: Shadcn UI dark mode. bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-primary. No heavy box inputs.
components.dashboard: Cardless or flat 1px bordered containers. High density. Mode B grid.

images.description: Sunny luxury living room with large windows. Use with bg-black/60 overlay to simulate the cooling effect of window tint.
Desert sunset palm trees silhouette for contact/footer background
White luxury house with cactus garden

media.icons: lucide-react for UI interactions. Use light stroke widths (strokeWidth={1.5}) for elegance.

animation.strategy: Smooth, elegant entrances. framer-motion for reveal text. Hover states on cards should have subtle shadow and lift.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure gold text on dark background meets 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a hybrid application with public marketing pages and a protected /admin route.
Use Playfair Display for headings and Outfit for body text.
Marketing layout must use generous spacing (py-24, gap-12), overlapping elements, and high contrast typography.
Hero section must use the living room image with a bg-black/60 overlay to ensure text legibility.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, dialogs, and dashboard elements. Customize them to fit the dark luxury theme (no generic rounded white cards).
Admin dashboard must use a dense 'Control Room' grid (Mode B) with 1px borders and flat surfaces.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements.
